3147830.name: Colors
3147830.description:
Discover the Hidden Hues in Colors
Embark on a vibrant puzzle adventure with Colors, where your mission is to uncover the hidden color beneath each square by analyzing the surrounding ambient color ratios.



Solo Game Play
Colors is a solo puzzle game where the challenge lies in deducing a hidden color beneath a square. The key to uncovering it lies in analyzing the color ratios of the surrounding squares.

Classic and Unique Puzzles
Explore a wide range of puzzles that combine ambient color ratios , offering both new and returning players a fresh experience.

Need Help Getting Started?
Learn the basics and advanced strategies in an intuitive tutorial mode designed to help you understanding the idea of the game.



Endless Puzzle Fun
Replay levels to perfect your strategy, experiment with different difficulty settings, and unlock hidden levels and grow up your stars as a reward for you to dive deeper into the world of Colors.
3147830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
